'''tatana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactivity|reactivity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactivity|reactivity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tatana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tætænæth|tætænæth]] || [[word:tætænæj|tætænæj]] || [[word:tætænæsh|tætænæsh]] || [[word:tætænæ|tætænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tatatanath|tatatanath]] || [[word:tatatanaj|tatatanaj]] || [[word:tatatanash|tatatanash]] || [[word:tatatana|tatatana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tatanath|tatanath]] || [[word:tatanaj|tatanaj]] || [[word:tatanash|tatanash]] || [[word:tatana|tatana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tatafnath|tatafnath]] || [[word:tatafnaj|tatafnaj]] || [[word:tatafnash|tatafnash]] || [[word:tatafnaf|tatafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tatanatha|tatanatha]] || [[word:tatanaja|tatanaja]] || [[word:tatanasha|tatanasha]] || [[word:tatanaka|tatanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tatanath|tatanath]] || [[word:tatanaj|tatanaj]] || [[word:tatanash|tatanash]] || [[word:tatana|tatana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tatanathal|tatanathal]] || [[word:tatanajal|tatanajal]] || [[word:tatanashal|tatanashal]] || [[word:tatanakal|tatanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tatanathatha|tatanathatha]] || [[word:tatanajaja|tatanajaja]] || [[word:tatanashasha|tatanashasha]] || [[word:tatanaka|tatanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tatanathan|tatanathan]] || [[word:tatanajan|tatanajan]] || [[word:tatanashan|tatanashan]] || [[word:tatanakan|tatanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tatanathaoro|tatanathaoro]] || [[word:tatanajaoro|tatanajaoro]] || [[word:tatanashaoro|tatanashaoro]] || [[word:tatanakaoro|tatanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
